remaining_concerns.concern: Rollback fragile when multiple steps touch same CSS file
remaining_concerns.commander_assessment: codex_worker.py creates automatic checkpoint commits per step. Steps that share custom.css (S1, S2, S5, S6) modify different sections of the file. Git revert can handle section-level changes. Will ensure each step is one atomic commit.
remaining_concerns.action: Enforce one commit per step via codex_worker.py
